creator: espen.jervidalo@gmail.com
text:
I cought a crash in /var/crash this night. But it didn't freeze it cycled the machine.

I can provide an archive from the /var/crash directory of needed.

First time I started the debugger, so this might not be helpful, but here goes:

# kgdb /boot/kernel/kernel -n 0
